text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho (Spring) is here. Gold City's
manager rushes to the waiting room to check on
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her manager reminds us of Gold City's promise to
quit racing if she fails to deliver a truly
eye-catching performance today, but this warning
only boosts Gold City's motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race, Tamamo Cross pays Gold City
not even a glance. This further fills Gold City with
the determination to not be outdone.
